title: Edit PhaseDetail.tsx to add spec/PRD attachment, conversation refs, read-only phase number, delete confirm
job:
Edit plugins/dev-department/src/ui/components/PhaseDetail.tsx to add missing features.

Read the existing file first. Make these changes:

1. Add Attach Spec button and form: when clicked, show inputs for title and sourceRef (URL), save creates a Spec record
2. Add Attach PRD button and form: same pattern, save creates a PRD record
3. Import and render ConversationRefs component for this phases conversation references (scopeType=phase, scopeId=phase.id)
4. Make phaseNumber read-only (display only, not editable input) — sortOrder controls actual ordering
5. Add a delete confirmation: when delete is triggered, show a confirm dialog before proceeding

Props should include: onAttachSpec, onAttachPRD, conversationRefs, onAddConversationRef, onUpdateConversationRef, onDeleteConversationRef callbacks.

Commit.
